candidate_definition_hints.text: The project is an official implementation of our CVPR2019 paper "Deep High-Resolution Representation Learning for Human Pose Estimation"
- [2021/04/12] Welcome to check out our recent work on bottom-up pose estimation (CVPR 2021) [HRNet-DEKR](https://github.com/HRNet/DEKR)!
